title: Characteristic organic reactions
summary: 9701 A Level — reaction types by functional group: substitution, addition, condensation, and redox.
learningObjectives: Classify organic reactions by mechanism type.
Predict products from functional group reagents.
Draw mechanisms for key A Level transformations.
Link reaction type to identifying tests.

simpleExplanation.title: Reaction toolkit
simpleExplanation.summary: Each functional group has characteristic reactions — learn reagents, conditions, and mechanism type together.

sections.content: **Characteristic reactions** (29.2) is the A Level organic capstone with **29.1** and **30.1**. Tabulate **reagent + condition + product**.
